summary: Smoke test regression for all 15 items after cosmetic redesigns. All 15 tests PASS. Login works (phone 9876543210 / OTP 123456). All 5 tabs load. Case creation, client creation, detail screens, calendar, profile, settings, FAQ, firm, referral code/stats, gift icon navigation, upgrade screen, and notifications all function correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: After successful POST /api/cases (200), the app does NOT navigate away from /cases/new. User stays on the form. Minor UX issue - case IS created and appears in list.

smoke_test_results.1_all_5_tabs_load: PASS - Dashboard, Cases, Calendar, Clients, More all load and are tappable
smoke_test_results.2_add_new_case: PASS - Case created via API (POST 200), appears in cases list. Minor: no auto-navigation after save.
smoke_test_results.3_case_detail_opens: PASS - Case detail at /cases/{id} opens with full content (hearing history, timeline, documents)
smoke_test_results.4_add_new_client: PASS - Client created (POST 200), navigates to client detail page
smoke_test_results.5_clients_list_loads: PASS - Clients tab loads (empty state shown with + button)
smoke_test_results.6_calendar_hearings_loads: PASS - Calendar tab shows March 2026 calendar with hearing events
smoke_test_results.7_my_profile_loads: PASS - Profile shows 'Test Advocate' and enrollment number 'BAR/2020/12345'
smoke_test_results.8_settings_loads: PASS - Settings shows Dark Mode, Hearing Reminders, Sync to Device Calendar, Export Data toggles
smoke_test_results.9_help_faq_opens: PASS - FAQ screen opens with search bar and accordion Q&A sections
smoke_test_results.10_law_firm_loads: PASS - Firm screen opens showing existing firm 'LawFlow Testing Firm' with members and Firm Dashboard
smoke_test_results.11_referral_code_visible: PASS - testID='referral-code-display' shows 'XXXXR5UC' (8-char code, not dashes)
smoke_test_results.12_referral_stats_correct: PASS - testID='referral-stats-text' shows '0 advocates referred · 0 rewards earned' (not loading)
smoke_test_results.13_gift_icon_navigates: PASS - testID='gift-refer-btn' on dashboard header navigates to /more?scrollTo=refer
smoke_test_results.14_upgrade_screen_loads: PASS - Upgrade screen shows Free/Pro plan cards with pricing toggle (Monthly ₹99 / Yearly ₹999)
smoke_test_results.15_notifications_loads: PASS - Bell icon on dashboard navigates to /notifications, shows 'You're all caught up'

action_items: LOW: After successful case creation in cases/new, add router.push('/cases') or router.back() navigation so user is redirected to cases list automatically
critical_code_review_comments: Multiple duplicate test cases created during automation (6 copies of 'State vs Test Client') due to no navigation after creation - the Create Case button can be clicked multiple times while staying on the same form
seed_data_creation: Created test cases 'CRL/2024/TEST001 - State vs Test Client' (6 copies due to automation) and client 'Test Client Smoke'
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 15 smoke tests pass. The only issue is cases/new doesn't auto-navigate after creation (stays on form). Referral code XXXXR5UC displays correctly. Pro plan active. Login flow: phone input → send OTP → fill second hidden input with '123456' → click 'Verify & Continue'.
